desc: r1.5 sub-DAG · expansion of viewer-decompose-plan per Griffin-directed scope. Two parallel sweeps: (A) skill-template parity for the 21 live skills currently lacking templates (finite, mechanical, per-skill node); (B) extract fleet's dashboard out of /home/griffin/src/fleet/dashboard/ into this repo at ./viewer/, then rebuild it roadmap-FIRST with a strictly nicer UX than fleet's (real-time DAG topology · per-node side panel · cross-lane rollup · trail timeline · search/filter · dark+light · PNG/SVG export). Migrate realtimeBridge off hard-coded fleet paths to read host-repo `.roadmap/`. Closes with per-page convergence loop on the new viewer.

viewer-extract-init.desc: Synthetic init for r1.5. Creates the ./viewer/ directory in /home/griffin/src/.dev/roadmap and writes a placeholder marker. Both sweeps (skill-template parity · dashboard extract) root from this init.

skill-template-bug-class-hunting.desc: Author templates/skills/bug-class-hunting.md by reading ~/.claude/skills/bug-class-hunting/SKILL.md and committing a byte-identical (or banner-augmented) template. Owned-by-roadmap-engine question: this skill is currently live-only · decide if roadmap-engine should own its template (yes if cited from roadmap-spec/auto/orient/term/threads/night skill family). Receipt records ownership decision.

skill-template-core-loop.desc: Author templates/skills/core-loop.md from live ~/.claude/skills/core-loop/SKILL.md. Cited by user-global CLAUDE.md as §Core-loop summary pointer; high-value template to ship.

skill-template-cross-page-sweep.desc: Author templates/skills/cross-page-sweep.md from live SKILL.md. Sibling to core-loop; cited in user-global CLAUDE.md.

skill-template-demo.desc: Author templates/skills/demo.md from live SKILL.md. Trivial scaffolding skill; ship template for completeness.

skill-template-fleet-doctrine.desc: Author templates/skills/fleet-doctrine.md from live SKILL.md. Fleet-owned · ownership decision likely PUNT to fleet repo · receipt records punt rationale if so (don't fabricate parity).

skill-template-fleet-doctrine-history.desc: Author templates/skills/fleet-doctrine-history.md from live SKILL.md. Same fleet-ownership question as fleet-doctrine; likely PUNT.

skill-template-griffin-voice.desc: Author templates/skills/griffin-voice.md from live SKILL.md. User-global · decide if roadmap-engine ships it or punts to user-global skills repo.

skill-template-keel-boundary-thesis.desc: Author templates/skills/keel-boundary-thesis.md from live SKILL.md. Fleet-owned doctrine; PUNT candidate.

skill-template-linear-audit.desc: Author templates/skills/linear-audit.md from live SKILL.md. Fleet-specific Linear protocol; PUNT candidate.

skill-template-meta-directives.desc: Author templates/skills/meta-directives.md from live SKILL.md. Cross-cutting (cited in fleet CLAUDE.md AND user-global). Ship in roadmap-engine because the 8 directives govern any agent loop.

skill-template-pcode-ir-lowering.desc: Author templates/skills/pcode-ir-lowering.md from live SKILL.md. Fleet-specific Ghidra/IR doctrine; PUNT candidate.

skill-template-peon-ping-config.desc: Author templates/skills/peon-ping-config.md from live SKILL.md. User-global UX skill; PUNT candidate to peon-ping repo.

skill-template-peon-ping-log.desc: Author templates/skills/peon-ping-log.md from live SKILL.md. PUNT candidate.

skill-template-peon-ping-toggle.desc: Author templates/skills/peon-ping-toggle.md from live SKILL.md. PUNT candidate.

skill-template-peon-ping-use.desc: Author templates/skills/peon-ping-use.md from live SKILL.md. PUNT candidate.

skill-template-per-page-convergence.desc: Author templates/skills/per-page-convergence.md from live SKILL.md. Used DIRECTLY by the viewer convergence loop in this same DAG; ship template.

skill-template-pipeline-thesis.desc: Author templates/skills/pipeline-thesis.md from live SKILL.md. Fleet-specific; PUNT candidate.

skill-template-pixel-diffuse.desc: Author templates/skills/pixel-diffuse.md from live SKILL.md. Fleet-specific; PUNT candidate.

skill-template-rovmk3-thesis.desc: Author templates/skills/rovmk3-thesis.md from live SKILL.md. Fleet-specific; PUNT candidate.

skill-template-sift-review.desc: Author templates/skills/sift-review.md from live SKILL.md. C++ review · fleet-specific; PUNT candidate.

skill-template-stance.desc: Author templates/skills/stance.md from live SKILL.md. User-global voice doctrine; ship in roadmap-engine because /stance register is invoked by roadmap-spec/auto.

skill-template-sweep-validator.desc: Aggregator + validator for the 21 skill-template nodes. Re-run skill-audit on the populated templates/ tree, emit a delta report: {authored, punted_with_reason, still_missing}. Asserts authored + punted == 21 (no dropped intent). §Honest-zero discipline: punted-with-reason is GREEN, dropped-without-reason is RED.

viewer-extract-scaffold.desc: Create ./viewer/ as a sibling to ./templates/ in the roadmap-engine repo. Initialize package.json (vue@^3.4 + vue-router@^4.6 + pinia@^2.1 + vite@^7 + vitest@^4 + tailwindcss@^4 · mirror fleet/dashboard manifest deps), tsconfig.json, vite.config.ts (no fleet hard-codes — host repo discovered via env or CLI flag), index.html, src/main.ts, src/App.vue placeholder. NO copy from fleet yet · just the empty shell.

validate.command: cd viewer && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile=false && pnpm exec vue-tsc --noEmit

viewer-port-core-readers.desc: Port the core-viewer readers from fleet/dashboard into viewer/src/services/: dagReader{,server}.ts, roadmapReader{,server}.ts, trailReader{,server}.ts. Generalize: replace any /home/griffin/src/fleet hard-codes with a HOST_REPO env (default cwd). Keep the test files (.test.ts) — port them too and adapt fixtures to the roadmap-engine repo's own .roadmap/ as a self-test corpus.

validate.command: cd viewer && pnpm vitest run src/services/dagReader.test.ts src/services/roadmapReader.test.ts

viewer-rewrite-realtime-bridge.desc: Rewrite realtimeBridge.ts off fleet's hard-coded paths. New design: SSE server reads HOST_REPO/.roadmap/{head.json,trail.jsonl,completed.json,heads/} via fs.watch · emits a typed event stream with discriminated union (head-changed · trail-appended · node-advanced · batch-rolled). Multi-lane aware: HOST_REPO can be a fleet.json registry pointing at sibling repos · bridge merges streams.

validate.command: cd viewer && pnpm vitest run src/services/realtimeBridge.test.ts

viewer-port-dag-component.desc: Port DagViewer.vue + useDagLayout.ts composable from fleet. Strip any fleet-specific assumptions (e.g. cluster names hard-coded). Render contract: takes typed `dag: DagSnapshot`, emits `nodeSelected(id)`. NO data fetching in component — props in, events out (§Dumb-components).

viewer-build-force-layout.desc: NICER-THAN-FLEET feature #1: force-directed DAG topology layout with d3-force (or equivalent). Interactive zoom/pan · group-by-depth and group-by-cluster toggles. Replaces fleet's static dagre-only layout. Composable: useForceLayout(dag, opts) returns reactive {nodes, edges} positions.

viewer-build-node-side-panel.desc: NICER feature #2: NodeSidePanel.vue — selecting any DAG node opens a panel with full desc · validators (rendered as checklist with pass/fail icons) · receipt JSON pretty-printed (collapsible jq-like tree) · git log of files in produces[] · live status badge (pending/in-progress/green/red driven off realtimeBridge stream).

viewer-build-cross-lane-rollup.desc: NICER feature #3: CrossLaneRollup.vue — reads fleet.json multi-lane registry · per-repo health cards (lane name · DAG id · current batch · ready/blocked count · last-trail-event timestamp) · 7-day throughput sparkline computed from each lane's trail.jsonl. This is the headline differentiator from fleet's dashboard, which is single-repo-centric.

viewer-build-trail-timeline.desc: NICER feature #4: TrailTimeline.vue — scrollable virtualized timeline of trail.jsonl events across all lanes. Each event is a row: timestamp · lane · node-id · event-kind · short summary · click-to-jump to NodeSidePanel. Filter chips: by kind, by lane, by date range.

viewer-build-search-filter.desc: NICER feature #5: global search/filter bar. Index across all loaded DAGs: by status, owner, tag, anchor cite (e.g. `cite:§Spec-as-typed-knowledge-graph`), free-text on desc. Composable useViewerSearch(query) returns {nodes, trailEvents, lanes} matches.

viewer-build-themes-and-export.desc: NICER feature #6+#7: dark/light theme toggle (CSS variables · prefers-color-scheme default · persisted to localStorage) AND PNG/SVG export of current DAG topology view (for paper figures · uses canvas/svg serialization). One node because both are presentation-layer polish.

viewer-cli-register-subcommand.desc: Register `roadmap viewer` as a first-class CLI subcommand. Spawns `pnpm --dir viewer dev` (or `vite preview` against viewer/dist if pre-built) with HOST_REPO=$PWD. `roadmap viewer --help` documents flags. Updates roadmap CLI's command registry; help-text in `roadmap help` lists viewer alongside make/orient/advance.

viewer-smoke-test-self-host.desc: Self-hosting smoke test: `roadmap viewer` against this repo's own .roadmap/ MUST render the live r1 DAG · current batch · trail events from the last 24h. Headless-Chromium screenshot diff against an enshrined reference (committed under tests/viewer/baseline/r1-self-host.png · re-baselined by Griffin only).

validate.command: cd viewer && pnpm vitest run tests/viewer/self-host.spec.ts

viewer-per-page-convergence.desc: Apply /per-page-convergence skill to the new viewer. Pages = top-level routes (Topology · Lanes · Trail · Search · NodeDetail). Per-page DAG: enshrined screenshot · functional-clickability checklist · pixel-similarity ≥0.95 against baseline. Closes only when all pages converge OR explicit punt with named successor.

viewer-r1.5-validator.desc: Round-terminal validator. Aggregates skill-template-sweep-validator + viewer-per-page-convergence + viewer-smoke-test-self-host into one rollup. Asserts: (a) all 21 skill rows accounted for (authored or punted-with-reason), (b) viewer renders self-host without error, (c) all 5 viewer pages converged-or-punted, (d) NO `/home/griffin/src/fleet` strings in viewer/src/. Emits LATE doctrine §Roadmap-viewer-as-host-repo-renderer if landed GREEN.
